text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: The day has finally come, Trainer.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
This is your debut race. My heart feels like it
might just burst!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
If anything, we should be calling this Super
Creek's debut race...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Do you have your handkerchief? What about
tissues? Don't you go forgetting things, now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I made sure to iron your clothes perfectly
yesterday. Okay, time to head out...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Wow, the crowd's cheers are so loud that we can
hear them from in here. So this is what a
racecourse is like...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Oh, are you okay? Please don't be afraid.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
There's nothing to be scared of, see? If you stay
calm, then I'm sure your abilities will shine...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, uh, right... That's true. I'll be the one running
in the middle of all these loud cheers...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
My heart's pounding all of a sudden. What should
I do?
choice_data_list:
Remember that I'm looking forward to seeing
you run!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh my... Just seeing your sparkling eyes as you
say that reminds me...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I'll just have to do my best. I can't let you down.
